title: yulania denudata var. elongata
intro: Yulania denudata var. elongata, also known as the Chinese flowering dogwood or elongated dogwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cornaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving immune function. The herbal preparations of Yulania denudata var. elongata include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory, gastrointestinal, and skin disorders.
